return(function(E,Y,z,l,D,m,y,s,d,j,e,Z,o,h,S,g,b,r,N,W,n,q,B)Z,h,S,s,n,j,o,g,r,N,W,b,d,e,B,q=function()r=r+(432901+-432900)d[r]=185447-185446 return r end,function(E)for end,625171+-625171,{},function(E)d[E]=d[E]-(741165+-741164)if d[E]==-177095-(-177095)then d[E],N[E]=nil,nil end end,function(E,w)local Y=h(w)local z=function(z,l)return S(E,{z,l},w,Y)end return z end,function(E,w)local Y=h(w)local z=function()return S(E,{},w,Y)end return z end return(B(642771+3685868,{}))(Y(y))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[w(-472762-(-464889))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
